items.name_cn:
Chanel 24A Doctor Bag In Stock
The most beautiful of the season! It really has to be the Haute Couture series~ The oil wax lambskin has a great texture, and even the opening method is so retro and fun 😜 The exquisite retro court-style shape is eye-catching, and it's a perfect finishing touch when worn 😎 The mini size can fit lipstick and compact powder, and the small size can fit a phone.
Small: 12×18×7cm
Model: AS4958

items.name_en: CHANEL 24a hobo This season❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥 this hobo is a must-have! Extremely lightweight! It fits almost everything you need, including your phone! Compared to previous hobo bags, this one has a fuller shape. The leather is oil-waxed patent leather.⛅️⛅️ The shoulder strap length is sufficient and it holds up well with heavy autumn/winter clothes! It might look average in photos, but once you touch the real thing and try it on, you'll love it! Black is very stable! The brown coffee color has a particularly retro vibe!

items.name_en: Chanel 24A Kelly Black Denim Large Size Available
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24A Kelly Black Denim Large Size Available
It's really so cute to me 🤩 The highest demand this season 🤩 Another retro fashion cycle 📣 The 1997 Kelly returns again 🫶 This time with a chain, retro yet stylish 🌠 The "King" is still the King 🔥 Can be carried as a handbag or crossbody, very lightweight, rich retro flavor, this feeling is just right 👌👌
Large size isn't too big~ Can fit an iPhone Pro, but not the Max, a bit of a stretch~ Exquisite but not too heavy, interior capacity is sufficient for daily use, the more you look at it, the more you like it, can't resist the girly heart 👸
Model: AS4416
Size: 19*13*7cm

items.name_cn:
Chanel 24B Felt Glitter CF
Dimensions: 10x20x7cm
The new 24B felt glitter CF is bursting with girlishness. The gentle tone and texture capture the heartstrings. The pinkish hue is like the softest cherry blossoms brushing against a girl's dream in spring. The bag body is embellished with small gold double-Cs, like a fairytale wonderland, intoxicating. The pink-gold woven chain design makes the bag look even more ethereal. The felt material combined with exquisite plaid shows an unintentional elegance and sweetness. The beautiful bag I'm talking about is her.

items.name_en: Chanel 24B Sheepskin Shell Bag in stock | Large batch photos
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24B Sheepskin Shell Bag in stock | Large batch photos
🖤This season's little dark horse🖤 This season's bright sheepskin shell bag is here🔥 No girl would refuse this bag, unless she hasn't fallen in love with it enough yet❗️❗️ The sheepskin really has great texture. I absolutely adore it at first sight. In my eyes, it is both fashionable and cute. I really can't praise it enough✌️✌️ The actual product is just incredibly, incredibly, incredibly, incredibly good-looking. It looks perfect from every angle💕💕 The shine is just right. This small bag is exquisite whether carried by hand or worn crossbody or on the shoulder, while full of vintage vibes🫶🫶 Go for it! Besties, buy it now❗️❗️❗️❗️
Size: 15*20*6cm
Model: AS5130

items.name_cn:
Chanel 24B Shell 🐚 Bag
Size: 20.5*28.5*7cm Pink sequined wool
New 24B wool shell bag, bursting with girly vibes. The gentle tones and texture capture the heart. The pink color is like the softest sakura in spring brushing over a girl's dream. The body is adorned with small gold double C, like a fairytale wonderland. The pink-gold woven chain design makes the bag look godly. The wool material and exquisite plaid show effortless elegance and sweetness. This is the bag you fall in love with at first sight.
Model No. AS3969

items.name_cn:
Chanel 24B Shell Bag 🐚
Size: 11*16*5.5cm, Small Black Faux Fur
The 24B Spring/Summer new oil-waxed sheepskin shell bag is a dazzling highlight this season. The bag body features shiny sheepskin that is beautifully bright, combining practicality and beauty. It has a unique charm, blending fashion and sophistication. Although it doesn't fit a phone, the capacity is still okay, and there is a card slot inside. The leather chain handle is very comfortable to carry. Ladies who haven't got one yet, hurry up and get it!
Style No. AS3354
